title: Question: modport checking when using interfaces
body:
---


Author Name: **Trevor Elbourne**
Original Redmine Message: 2056 from https://www.veripool.org



---

I've been testing the use of interfaces with verilator, and have found that modports don't seem to be properly observed.

If I declare a signal as an "input" in a modport definition in an interface, I seem to be able to drive that input within a module which is connected to that interface - without verilator throwing an error.

Is there any way to get verilator to check modport inputs/outputs properly?

Regards,
Trevor.
